_meta.confidenceNotes: Pricing data sourced from official websites and reputable tech reviews, but all data is as of October 2023. Users should verify current prices. Credit-based models (Adobe Firefly, Stable Diffusion DreamStudio) are presented as credit packs rather than monthly subscriptions; typical values may be approximate. Adobe Firefly also available via Creative Cloud subscription ($54.99/mo) which is not captured here. Dual-source verification is incomplete due to limited access to live sources.
